ctxMarket: Attention is shifting away from memecoins on Solana DEXs as their popularity declines. Meanwhile, Solana’s payments and stablecoin activity are drawing notice for significant year-over-year growth.
ctxTalking:
• Memecoins losing traction and market share on Solana DEXs
• Brera Holdings’ sharp pivot from sports to a Solana-focused strategy, including a rebrand to Solmate
• Surging stablecoin and payment volumes on Solana, with network metrics outperforming broader market trends
ctxMatters: Shifting focus from memecoins may signal changing user priorities or maturing ecosystem interests. Brera’s pivot highlights growing institutional bets on Solana’s infrastructure. Record payment and stablecoin activity could attract more builders and capital to the network.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Declining memecoin activity and rising payment volumes suggest evolving use cases on Solana.
Noise: Short-term price swings in meme tokens tied to external political events.
ctxGlossary:
DEX — Decentralized Exchange, where users trade crypto assets without intermediaries
Stablecoin — A cryptocurrency pegged to a stable asset, often used for payments and transfers

readMore.title: Memecoins lose out on Solana DEX amid reduced popularity – What happens now?
Brera Stock Plunges Amid Growing Solana Pivot as 'Solmate' Firm Dumps Soccer Teams
Brera board approves Solmate pivot, cuts soccer teams to focus on Solana
